narrative:
Huber Heights 5-C (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,074 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
